name: /prompt-ab statistical honesty guard switches to qualitative-only mode when sample size is below 30
command: mkdir -p prompts/x && printf 'name: x\n' > prompts/x/v1.0.0.md && printf 'name: x\n' > prompts/x/v1.1.0.md && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/prompt-ab.sh" x v1.0.0 v1.1.0 --eval-stub n=20 --dry-run 2>out.txt && grep -q 'mode=qualitative-comparison-only' out.txt && grep -q 'sample_size=20' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
